import hashlib
import hmac
import secrets


def hash_password(password: str) -> str:
    salt = secrets.token_hex(16)
    key = hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac("sha256", password.encode(), salt.encode(), 300000)
    return f"{salt}:{key.hex()}"


def generate_api_token(user_id: int, secret: str) -> str:
    payload = f"{user_id}:{secret}"
    return hmac.new(secret.encode(), payload.encode(), hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()


def verify_integrity(data: bytes, expected_hash: str) -> bool:
    computed = hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()
    return hmac.compare_digest(computed, expected_hash)


def create_session_id(user_id: int) -> str:
    return secrets.token_urlsafe(32)
